title: Ugadi — New Year Reflection
description: Begin the academic year cycle with intention. Reflect on what civilizational inquiry means in campus life.
shloka: āyur deho balam varcaḥ prajñā śrīr balam eva ca
shlokaMeaning: May there be long life, health, strength, radiance, wisdom, and prosperity.

title: Gītā Saṃvāda — Weekly Session
description: Weekly reading circle on Bhagavad Gītā Chapter 2. Open to all curious minds.
shloka: karmany evadhikaras te ma phalesu kadacana
shlokaMeaning: You have a right to action alone, never to its fruits.

title: Rāma Navamī Observance
description: Commemorate the birth of Śrī Rāma with kīrtana, readings from Rāmāyaṇa, and community prasāda.
shlokaMeaning: Rāma is the embodiment of Dharma.

title: Temple Visit — Mahabalipuram
description: Guided yātrā to Pallava shore temples. Study iconography and maritime Indic architecture.
shloka: deśo deśāntaraṃ yāti jñānaṃ caiva na tiṣṭhati
shlokaMeaning: One may travel across lands, yet knowledge does not stay still — it must be sought.
